'''Quaensan Prime''' was a [[Gendius sector/Legends|Gendius sector]], [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world on the [[Cerean Reach/Legends|Cerean Reach]], near the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system]]. Its inhabitants were wiped out by the [[Reslian Purge]], similar to what happened to the [[Tunroth]].
